name: Italian Sausage in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the Italian sausage to the skillet and cook for a few minutes, just long enough to seal or firm up the sausage.
3. Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside to cool.
4. In the same skillet, mix together the remaining ingredients: tomato sauce, oregano, and sliced mushrooms.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low.
6. Add the cooled sausage back into the skillet and continue cooking for 1 hour on low heat.
7. Serve as a hot appetizer. You may wish to be cautious with the wine at first; some people may find 1 cup too much.
>From Justin Wilson's Outdoor Cooking With Inside Help.
